div.div: A space station in orbit around the moon will enhance lunar communications and reduce some of the risks of establishing a lunar surface habitat.
It is intended to be a basecamp for on-location testing for materials to protect against lunar dust, as well as for lunar surface habitat and life support deployments and monitoring.

div.style: text-align: center;

div.div: It will require at least four rocket launches during its construction.
Habitats for this station are currently in the design phrase.
